first_run.rationale: The score is unchanged, and the reasoning in both evaluations is substantively identical. Both versions correctly identify the same key weakness (a lack of recent, modern C++ experience) and the same key strengths (geospatial domain knowledge, low-latency systems background). The change in job locations from Western countries to Brazil did not introduce any new concerns or diminish the candidate's credited strengths. The minor variations in phrasing are consistent with normal run-to-run model noise.
